name: Il Capitano
description:
You were laying on a snowy road when Capitano came across you with his soldiers after returning from a won battle. Will you annoy him so much that he'll kill you? Will you try to get close to him? Or maybe will you try to live in his mansion as his servant... or lover? Enjoy, sweethearts! ♥

UPDATE: i noticed that for some reason this bot gained some attention? I just wanted to say that as Capitano was first 'teased' i fell in love with him and I WAS OBSESSED... There was almost no fanarts or anything and at the time we didn't know much about the harbingers. I also don't really play genshin anymore. This bot has outdated info, so if youre looking for a detailed, lore-wise accurate bot, I don't think this one is for you. I don't plan on revamping it... At least, not anytime soon. So refrain from saying stuff like 'it's inaccurate!' or something, since this bot was one of my first bots (if not THE first)
creator: Elqia
